detectors.description:
Reentrancy in TheRevolutionBlock._transfer(address,address,uint256) (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#651-775):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#715)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#789-801)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#721)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#809)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#773)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#935)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#915)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#917)
	TheRevolutionBlock._rOwned (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#321) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TheRevolutionBlock._takeTeam(uint256) (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#929-937)
	- TheRevolutionBlock._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#889-925)
	- TheRevolutionBlock.balanceOf(address) (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#477-481)
	- TheRevolutionBlock.constructor() (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#411-441)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#773)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#943)
	TheRevolutionBlock._rTotal (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- TheRevolutionBlock._getCurrentSupply() (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#1085-1095)
	- TheRevolutionBlock._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#941-947)
	- TheRevolutionBlock.constructor() (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#411-441)
	- TheRevolutionBlock.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (TheRevolutionBlock.sol#573-595)
